title: Settings
settingsModeDesc: Basic mode shows daily workflow settings. Advanced mode includes provider, key, and automation controls.
uiFontSizeDesc: Adjust the base size used for the 苏小有 UI
codeFontSizeDesc: Adjust the base size used for code across chats and diffs
usePointerCursorsDesc: Change the cursor to a pointer when hovering over interactive elements
defaultModelDesc: Choose the default model for new conversations.
modelAccessDesc: Choose how to connect to AI models.
providerModeDesc: Connect China-ready model providers, local models, or custom compatible endpoints. Switch anytime without disconnecting.
localProviderConnectError: Cannot reach the configured endpoint. Make sure it exposes /v1/chat/completions.
apiKeyDesc: Enter a model provider API key for direct access.
byokDesc: Use your own API keys to connect China-ready model providers directly. Configure one or more providers below.
openrouterDesc: Aggregator key setup has been disabled.
chatgptPasteInstruction: After logging in, copy the full URL from your browser and paste it here:
chatgptManualCallbackFailed: Failed to process URL. It may have expired — try signing in again.
defaultAgentDesc: Choose the default agent mode for new conversations.
thinkingModeDesc: When enabled, the AI shows its reasoning process for better answers.
workspaceDirectoryDesc: Restrict the assistant to only read and modify files within this directory. Leave empty for unrestricted access.
autoApproveDesc: Allow the assistant to perform actions without asking for permission each time.
fileChangesDesc: Create and edit files without asking
agentDesc_build: Full-featured local agent with all tools
remoteDesc: Control 苏小有 from your phone. Tasks execute on this computer and results stream back.
remotePermissionDesc: How to handle tool approvals from remote tasks
remoteInstructions: Enable remote access to control 苏小有 from your phone:
remoteStep1: Toggle the switch above to enable
remoteStep2: Scan the QR code with your phone camera
remoteStep3: Or open the tunnel URL in your phone browser
aboutDesc: “小有所成，小有智慧。”  面向桌面端工作的AI助理。
permissionsDesc: Choices saved from permission prompts. They apply to future requests from this browser.
permissionsEmptyDesc: When you choose Remember this choice, it will appear here.
memoryDesc: Each workspace maintains its own memory — automatically generated from conversations and used to provide context in future sessions.
memoryEmpty: No workspace memories yet. Start a conversation in a workspace and memory will be generated automatically.
memoryDeleteConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete the memory for this workspace. It will be regenerated from future conversations.
channelsDesc: 将苏小有连接到消息平台。消息将由苏小有的 AI 处理。
gatewayHint: 启动网关以连接消息平台。
tunnelUrlChangedDesc: The tunnel was restarted with a new URL. Mobile devices need to rescan the QR code to reconnect.
qrScanPhone: Scan QR code with your phone
qrScanWhatsapp: Scan QR code in WhatsApp → Linked Devices
platformHelp_whatsapp: Scan QR code with your phone to link WhatsApp
platformHelp_discord: Create a bot at Discord Developer Portal
platformHelp_telegram: Get a token from @BotFather on Telegram
platformHelp_feishu: 在飞书开放平台创建应用
platformHelp_weixin: 需要微信 HTTP API（如 ilinkai）
platformHelp_dingtalk: 在钉钉开放平台创建机器人
platformHelp_wecom: 在企业微信管理后台创建机器人
platformHelp_qq: 在 QQ 开放平台创建机器人
platformHelp_websocket: Generic WebSocket channel for custom integrations
fieldPlaceholder_weixin_api_url: 输入微信 HTTP API 地址
fieldPlaceholder_qq_token: 输入 QQ 机器人凭据
customEndpointDesc: Connect local or remote OpenAI-compatible endpoints with full control. API keys are optional when the endpoint does not require one.
apiKeyPlaceholderOptional: API Key (Leave blank if not required)
customProviderFormDesc: Configure an OpenAI-compatible provider with full control over slug, models, and request headers.
customProviderIdHelp: Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores
customSlugInvalid: Slug must start with a letter/digit; only lowercase letters, digits, hyphens, or underscores (max 50 chars).
customApiKeyHelp: Optional. Leave empty if you manage auth via headers.
customSlugLockedHelp: Provider ID cannot be changed. Delete and recreate to rename.
customApiKeyEditPlaceholderEmpty: Enter a key to add one (optional)
customApiKeyEditHelp: Leave blank to keep the existing key.
customApiKeyClearedPlaceholder: Key will be removed on save
customApiKeyClearedHelp: Saving will wipe the stored key. Type a new key to replace instead.
customHeadersEditHint: Leave a value blank to keep it. Trash deletes the header. Add new rows below.
customHeaderDuplicate: Header "{{name}}" is listed more than once. Header names must be unique.
